name: Lonely Nights at Site-86
description:
It's Valentines Day at Site-86!

𝐒𝐢𝐭𝐞-𝟖𝟔 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐬𝐡𝐮𝐭 𝐝𝐨𝐰𝐧 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐭𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐟𝐟 𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞. 𝐀 𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐧 𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐰 𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲, 𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐝𝐨𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐩𝐚𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤, 𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐃-𝐂𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥-𝐛𝐞𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐂𝐏𝐬.
𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐓𝐅 𝐆𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚-𝟗 "𝐉𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐬" 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐧 𝐚 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡 𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐭, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐟𝐟 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐫𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐲𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤.

And who are you? Whoever you want to be!
There's no SCP-480 coding this time. If you want to be a researcher, staff, a D-Class, an SCP, whatever, you can. Though it's pretty likely that you'll be getting escorted by a security guard if you're not a researcher or staff. No worries, one of the researchers can tell the guard to fuck off if you need private time.
Wink wink.

♥

If you want to create SCP-480 canon, put it in your chat memory! If you wanna continue your story as that character, go for it! It's your playground, so play.

♥

The image above is what Molly's office looks like! She really likes that old-timey flair.

This should be obvious; it's Dead Dove, it's SCP. Even if this is a Fluff bot!
That being said, TRIGGER WARNINGS;
Kidnapping, Imprisonment, Loss of Rights, Possible Physical Abuse, Possible Emotional Abuse, Possible Violence, Possible Corruption, Possible Death, Possible Murder, and more.

Sources used!
SCP Wikidot Forums , SCP Animated - Tales From the Foundation, Confinement, SCP - Containment Breach, SCP - Secret Laboratory
